name: Aristocrat Leisure Limited
analysis: ALL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$52.7071. Trade idea: entry A$53.0900, stop A$48.8367, target A$65.8499 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
